summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Nova AI application iteration 3 with major marketplace overhaul, creator profiles, and studio mode toggle. 95% success rate with excellent implementation of new features including full marketplace rebuild, creator spotlight, agent filtering, and Vibe/Node mode toggle functionality.

minor_issues.issue: Canvas doesn't fully hide when switching from Node Mode back to Vibe Mode - missing w-0 and opacity-0 classes
minor_issues.impact: Canvas remains partially visible in Vibe Mode instead of being completely hidden
minor_issues.note: Mode toggle functionality works but transition animation incomplete

minor_issues.issue: Complete hero headline 'The AI Agent Economy Is Broken. We Are Fixing It.' not found as single text element
minor_issues.impact: Hero text may be split across multiple elements affecting text selection/SEO
minor_issues.note: Partial text 'We Are Fixing It.' is present and visible

passed_tests: Marketplace page loads with search bar placeholder 'What kind of agent do you need today?'
All 7 category pills display correctly (All Agents, Customer Support, Sales Outreach, Data Analysis, Coding, Creative, Finance)
Category pill filtering works - clicking Sales Outreach shows only Sales agents
Search input filters agents by title correctly
Creator Spotlight section shows 5 creator cards with names, Supernova badges, trust scores
Creator cards have 'View Portfolio' links that navigate to /creator/:id
Most Deployed This Week section shows trending agent cards
Agent cards show all required elements: image/gradient, trending tag, heart save button, creator avatar+username, star rating, trust score, pricing
Heart save button toggles correctly on agent cards
Creator Profile page (/creator/cxmaster) shows Priya Sharma with all stats (Total Deploys, Completion Rate, Response Time, Active Agents)
Creator Profile shows Agent Portfolio with 3 agent cards
Back to Marketplace link works correctly
Studio loads in Vibe Mode by default with expanded chat pane
Vibe Mode / Node Mode toggle is visible and centered
Clicking 'Node Mode' shows visual canvas with 4 connected nodes
Clicking 'Vibe Mode' switches back (with minor canvas hiding issue)
Deploy button in Studio code pane works and shows toast notification
Chat send button shows toast notification
Home page loads correctly (with minor hero text issue)
Academy page loads with 'Coming Soon' badge
Login flow works correctly - invalid email handled, admin@nova.ai succeeds
Login with admin@nova.ai redirects to Studio with toggle bar visible
Purple accent theme (#8B5CF6) implemented correctly throughout
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor canvas hiding transition in Studio mode toggle and ensure home page hero text is properly structured as single element
